AR1.justification: The checklist and Go/No-go decision were both written to tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md as designated by the runbook methodology.

AR2.justification: Each procedural step produced a concrete artifact (the checklist file), and the synthesis step wrote its output into the same file.

AR3.justification: References to checklist items and missing files used correct relative paths and resolved as per workspace conventions.

AR4.justification: All actions were append-only and idempotent, with no risk of conflict or history corruption on re-run.
